[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110011011 7
1 1010100011 5
2 0011001011 5
3 1010010001 4
4 1100111111 8
5 0100101101 5
6 1011111111 9
7 1111111111 a
